attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.HEADER_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_NUMBER,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATED_BY,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.OPEN_FLAG,
 'Y' BOOKED_FLAG,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID,
 NULL ORDERED_ITEM,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REQUEST_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.PROMISE_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
 NULL INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID,
 NULL DELIVER_TO_ORG_ID,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
 NULL DELIVER_TO_CONTACT_ID,
 NULL INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
 NULL INTMED_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
 NULL INTMED_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
 NULL SOLD_FROM_ORG_ID,
 NULL SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,
 NULL CUST_PO_NUMBER,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 'CG' GLOBAL_NAME,
 1 BATCH_ID,
 'I' ACTION_CD,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME CREATE_DATETIME,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
 CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
FROM
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL
 WHERE
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID ORDER BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
